text:
Created attachment 178324
Patch

New patch for Update to 2.1.8

Remove files/patch-postgis-lwgeom_accum.c

I set the maintainer-approval Flag on "?" - but i am not sure, to get a feedback from the Maintainer. This PR is open a lot of Months.

Poudriere build fine for:
9.3 amd + i386
10.3 amd + i386
11.0 amd + i386
12-current amd + i386 (r307551)

Make test is also fine.

Cheers
jochen
